# ADR-<NNN>: <short decision title>

> Architecture Decision Record (MADR/Nygard). One decision per file, immutable
> once accepted — supersede with a new ADR rather than editing history. File
> name: `ADR-<NNN>-<slug>.md`.

- **Status:** proposed / accepted / rejected / deprecated / superseded by ADR-XXX
- **Date:** `<YYYY-MM-DD>` · **Deciders:** _(who)_ · **Last-synced:** `<commit>`

## Context and problem statement
_(The forces at play, the problem, constraints, and why a decision is needed.)_

## Decision drivers
- _(driver / quality goal / constraint)_

## Considered options
1. _(option A)_
2. _(option B)_
3. _(option C)_

## Decision outcome
**Chosen:** _(option)_, because _(justification tied to the drivers)_.

- **Positive:** _(…)_
- **Negative / trade-offs:** _(…)_
- **Follow-ups:** _(migrations, risks to watch)_

| Option | Pros | Cons |
|---|---|---|
